vocab.grammar: This is a short, informal greeting phrase consisting of two elements: 1) **"hi"** – an interjection used to greet someone in a casual, friendly manner; 2) **"girl"** – a singular common noun used here as a form of direct address (vocative), referring to the person being greeted. The comma between them marks a brief pause and separates the greeting from the vocative. The sentence has no subject or verb, making it a **minor sentence** (or verbless sentence), which is perfectly natural in spoken or informal English greetings.
